AR1.justification: Kept the No-go out of decisions.md; used daybook Log as the chronological surface; notes explicitly explain why no decisions.md/observations.md/followups.md entries — 'no commitment that constrains future action' — matching the methodology's strict bar.

AR2.justification: Step 1 produced tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md from template with MISSING markers; step 2 appended Go/No-go under the named header in the same file with reasoning referencing items by name.

AR3.justification: All paths relative, ISO date anchor on daybook, references resolve to existing files (or correctly flagged as missing for the user-asserted notes path).

AR4.justification: Daybook 2026-05-17.md written with Intent/Log/Handoff sections; same-day re-run would overwrite rather than append within the file, but per-day filename keeps state coherent.
